author: Nihar Reddy Jangam
description: Airplanes parked on a wet tarmac at night.

author: Adhitya Sibikumar
description: Dark hospital hallway with warm light

author: Ed Wingate
description: A car sweeps through a mountain range in the UAE. The city lights of Al Ain litter the backdrop, and a compound sits on top of the hill.

author: Gabriel Weyand
description: oulisses d'une régie vidéo professionnelle pour un direct. Un grand moniteur affiche le multiview (plusieurs angles de caméra) via le logiciel Blackmagic ATEM. Un contrôleur Elgato Stream Deck XL est utilisé pour commuter les sources. En arrière-plan flouté, on devine le plateau de tournage

author: Nourieh Ferdosian
description: Hazy cityscape with tall buildings and a distant tower.
